site.name: Sridhar M
site.title: Frontend Developer & UI/UX Designer
site.intro: I design and build products end-to-end — from the first wireframe to the deployed API. I care about clean interfaces, fast software, and code that's a joy to maintain.

about.description: I'm a frontend developer and electronics engineer based in Chennai who enjoys turning complex problems into simple, elegant interfaces. Outside of shipping features at work, I build side projects, contribute to open source, and write about what I learn.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Responsive, performant websites built with modern frameworks and clean, maintainable code.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: User-centered interface design, from wireframes to high-fidelity, developer-ready prototypes.

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Pixel-perfect, accessible interfaces with smooth interactions and cross-browser consistency.
